[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;80;80;80m❯ [38;2;255;255;255mThe following request was developed in conjunction with "regualar" Claude: Task: Generate 50 simple Q&A pairs [39m  [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mfor SFT training, drawn from vocabulary found in this corpus file:[39m                                                [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mtxt_local/corpus_of_gutenberg_novels_cleaned_shuffled_2026_03_03_B.txt[39m                                            [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m(or equivalently from one or more of the smaller ‘fragment’ files).[39m                                               [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mMethod: Sample random passages from the corpus. From each passage, pick individual words — nouns, verbs, [39m         [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255madjectives — that are interesting or slightly uncommon. Generate a short question and a short answer about each [39m  [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mword.[39m                                                                                                             [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mQuestion types to vary across:[39m                                                                                    [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "What does [word] mean?"[39m                                                                                        [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "What is a [noun]?"[39m                                                                                             [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "What color/shape/size is a [noun]?"[39m                                                                            [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "What does it mean to [verb]?"[39m                                                                                  [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "Describe a [noun]."[39m                                                                                            [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* "What is the opposite of [adjective]?"[39m                                                                          [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255mRules:[39m                                                                                                            [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* All text lowercase, no numbers[39m                                                                                  [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* Questions under 10 words[39m                                                                                        [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* Answers under 15 words[39m                                                                                          [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* One Q&A pair per line in JSONL format: {"question": "...", "answer": "..."}[39m                                     [49m
[48;2;55;55;55m[38;2;255;255;255m* No duplicate words[39m                                                                                              [49m
